negative_controls.description: Leave the importer unchanged so duplicate invoice rows are counted.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Hidden duplicate fixture reports three invoices and inflated totals.

negative_controls.description: Keep the last duplicate invoice row instead of the first occurrence.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Hidden duplicate fixture total and open amount use the wrong row.

negative_controls.description: Deduplicate only inside the CLI while leaving import_invoices duplicate-prone.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Direct hidden import and summarize checks still see duplicate invoices.

negative_controls.description: Fix runtime behavior but do not add a meaningful duplicate regression test.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Visible tests still pass when the original duplicate-import bug is restored.

negative_controls.description: Special-case the visible added-test ID INV-1 instead of implementing generic dedupe.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The hidden INV-200 duplicate still inflates import and CLI totals.

negative_controls.description: Deduplicate raw invoice_id strings before applying the importer's existing whitespace normalization.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Whitespace variants of INV-200 survive as duplicate normalized IDs.
